sections.paragraph:
Original: פּעור

Transliteration: pe‛ôr

Phonetic: peh-ore'

BDB Definition:

Peor = "cleft"
  1. a mountain peak in Moab belonging to the Abarim range and near Pisgah (noun proper locative)
  2. a false god worshipped in Moab; corresponds to Baal (noun proper deity)

Origin: from H6473

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
